title: Facility
description: A DOC facility (jail) — e.g. the Rikers Island jails and the borough detention centers. DERIVED entity: DOC publishes no facility-roster dataset, so this schema formalizes the 'FACILITY' dimension that appears across the incident, lock-in, medical, and waitlist datasets, joined to the DOC facilities directory on nyc.gov/site/doc. Keyed on facility code.

x-source.derived_from: FACILITY dimension across 7479-ugqb, 9dab-x6kn, erra-pzy8, gakf-suji, k548-32d3, 7hi3-kaps, f64t-5yiv, 5n4h-km5r, q9w2-yi4x

facilityName.description: Full facility name (e.g. 'Anna M. Kross Center').

type.description: Facility type (e.g. detention jail, hospital prison ward, borough facility, floating facility).

onRikersIsland.description: Whether the facility is located on Rikers Island.

active.description: Whether the facility is currently operational.
